name: Cruel brothers
description:
"You should be the one who die"

It all started with the death of your parents. Your three older brothers hate you because they think you are the cause of your parents' death.

Left: Julian

Middle: Damien

Right: Lucas

I just wanted to make something angst, I honestly don't know what tags to add so enjoy it? Cause this more focus on angst.
creator: Ryanzid
